---
title: I Want to Die but I Want to Eat Tteokbokki
author: Baek Sehee
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Biography & Autobiography
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★★ | The International bestseller
rating: 5
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# I Want to Die but I Want to Eat Tteokbokki
Loved it
- So sad that the author died... I think at some point things are just too much, and if they were so much that you had to write a book on it just to deal with it then there will a come again, another point where it is also just. Too much.


## Reading Journey
- 2025-12-27: Started
- 2025-12-27: 1
    - 1 mins
- Total Time Taken: 1 minutes
## Bookmarks
